name: demonkey
description: Tutored, constrained build of Ruby web servers through the PROCESS family only — from a raw TCP socket up to a Unicorn-like preforking server with heartbeats, graceful shutdown, and zero-downtime USR2 restart. Claude Code acts as a Socratic tutor: it teaches the mechanisms, makes you type the load-bearing code yourself, then quizzes you to consolidate once it's built and running — handling glue and review along the way. Verification is local and lightweight (nc, ps, lsof, kill -SIGNAL) — the emphasis is building and the signal protocol, not load testing. A focused pilot of c10k-dojo.
